_comment: VS Code extensions installed by the PM Hackathon bootstrap. Edit freely; the script reads this at runtime.
_howToAdd: Add new entries to either 'coreExtensions' (always installed) or 'mcpExtensions' (MCP servers/managers). Each entry: { id, name, optional: enabled (default true), note }.
_mcpPlaceholderNote: MCP extension list will be finalized by hackathon organizers. Add the agreed-upon IDs to 'mcpExtensions' above. Anything in this array is installed exactly like coreExtensions.
